stemHtml: For flight planning purposes, a pilot uses a Lambert conformal conic projection navigation chart with a constant of cone equal to 0.83. From his/her current position (50°N,175°E), he/she draws a straight line on the map to the destination. At the current position, the track to the destination is 073°(T), whilst at destination the course is 078°(T). What is the longitude of the destination?
